THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_CHARACTER.aroma: [sine][blue]...I am the king of the hive...[/blue][/sine]
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_CHARACTER.cards: Insatiable Sandworm cards now appear in rewards and shops.
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_CHARACTER.descr:
A [gold]Insatiable Sandworm[/gold] from the hive, hiding in [gold]quicksand[/gold] is its innate ability.
Now awakened, it is determined to [gold]devour[/gold] everything in the tower.
